release_risks: Breadth/news/macro/narrative live market channels remain NOT_CONFIGURED.
Bilingual parity is proven on primary path, not every UI page.
Provider long-run stability sample is small and the 2h soak used failsafe provider degradation.
Stale UI server guard remains a known product risk.

autonomous_operations.evidence: Daily phases, recovery, 500 accelerated cycles, and 2h real-duration soak are proven.

background_runtime.evidence: Daemon, EventStream, DecisionLoop, persistence, scheduler sleep, and two-hour loop are proven.

bilingual_parity.evidence: Primary setup/home zh/en path is proven; exhaustive page-level parity is not proven.

forecast_accountability.evidence: Forecast lifecycle records expectations before outcomes and computes errors.

llm_routing.evidence: Volcano fallback route and Decision Contract parse were live-proven; failure matrix is repeatable.

market_awareness.evidence: At least one live price/volume observation reached daemon/EventStream/DecisionLoop/UI.

market_freshness.evidence: Price/volume freshness is visible; breadth/news/macro/narrative remain NOT_CONFIGURED.

portfolio_cognition.evidence: UI-configured portfolios change normal runtime output under same market state.

recovery.evidence: Daemon restart, UI restart, stale PID, malformed JSONL, provider outage, and market outage passed.

security.evidence: Secret masking, no raw secret artifact, and tracked secret-shape scan passed.

self_iteration.evidence: Treatment/control forecast miss changes later trust, hypothesis scores, and structural shift.

stability.evidence: 2h real-duration stability is proven; 24h unattended stability is not proven.

ui_usability.evidence: First-time setup/start/ask/stop path has browser and repeatable validation evidence.
